description_long: This is a tall, elegant bar stool featuring a round, padded seat upholstered in deep brown leather with a row of metallic studs encircling the edge. The stool has a curved, semi-circular backrest that is also padded and supported by three wooden slats, providing both comfort and style. The armrests are integrated into the backrest, forming a continuous, flowing wooden structure that adds a sophisticated touch. Four sturdy, turned wooden legs support the seat, connected by two circular wooden footrests at different heights for stability and comfort. The wood is finished in a rich, dark brown, complementing the leather upholstery. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for upscale urban environments such as bars, restaurants, or hotel lobbies.
description: A tall, dark wood bar stool with a round, leather-upholstered seat, curved padded backrest, and decorative metal studs. Features integrated armrests and circular footrests for comfort and stability.
description_view_0: The stool is seen from a front-side angle, highlighting the curved backrest, padded seat, and one armrest, with the circular footrest and turned legs visible.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the three wooden slats supporting the backrest and the full curvature of the padded back, as well as the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and footrests.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the first, displaying the opposite armrest, the round seat, and the detailed woodwork of the legs and footrest rings.
description_view_3: The direct front view emphasizes the padded seat, the open space between the armrests, and the inviting, ergonomic shape of the backrest.
